name: Manifolds & Tangent Spaces
description: Smooth manifold, atlas, charts. Tangent space T_pM, derivative. Submersion, immersion.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Smooth manifold\natlas, charts φ:U→ℝⁿ"]
    D2["Def: Tangent space\nT_pM derivations"]
    D3["Def: df pushforward\nmap on T_p"]
    D4["Def: Submersion\nrank df = dim N"]
    T1["Thm: T_pM ≅ ℝⁿ\ndim M"]
    T2["Thm: Immersion theorem\nrank k ⇒ local coords"]
    T3["Thm: Submersion thm\nlocal onto"]
    T4["Thm: Regular value\nf⁻¹(c) submanifold"]
    T5["Thm: Whitney embed\nM↪ℝ²ⁿ"]
    D1 --> D2
    D2 --> D3
    D3 --> D4
    D2 --> T1
    D4 --> T3
    D3 --> T4
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    class D1,D2,D3,D4 definition
    class T1,T2,T3,T4,T5 theorem
